rules.name: Multi-Tenant Isolation Guard
rules.description: Verify PostgreSQL Row Level Security (RLS) active session tenant ID context setting prior to DB interaction.

rules.name: India PII Scrubbing Compliance
rules.description: Ensure telemetry, logging, and response payloads execute scrubPII regex pattern filters on Aadhaar and PAN numbers.

rules.name: Regional Polymorphism Integrity
rules.description: Ensure country packs and court procedural state-machines utilize polymorphic expansion contracts instead of hardcoded region values.

rules.name: TSConfig Schema Alignment
rules.description: Ensure workspace subpackages extend base monorepo compiler options configuration.

rules.name: Package Boundary Segregation
rules.description: Strictly prohibit relative directory traversal imports across sibling packages.

rules.name: Dependency Resolution Integrity
rules.description: Validate absolute path mappings (@/) and local relative module locations against physical filesystem paths.

rules.name: Homepage Shell Hierarchy
rules.description: Verify homepage contains essential visual anchors: branding header/Navbar, Footer section, and sign-in CTA components.

rules.name: Sidebar Navigation Integrity
rules.description: Ensure active sidebar directories contain 0 dead links or placeholders (# or javascript:void(0)).

rules.name: Responsive Space and Whitespace consistency
rules.description: Check layout hierarchies for vertical spacing anomalies, duplicate container renders, and broken responsive grids across mobile, tablet, and desktop views.
